title: Battle of Duro (disambiguation)
content:
There have been several '''battles taking place on or around [[Duro/Legends|Duro]]''' throughout galactic history. Below are several.

'''[[Mandalorian Wars]]'''
:*[[Battle of Duro (Mandalorian Wars)|Battle of Duro]]
'''[[Galactic War]]'''
:*[[Battle of Duro (Galactic War)|Battle of Duro]]
'''[[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]]'''
:*[[Battle of Duro (Clone Wars)|Battle of Duro]]
:*[[Second battle of Duro]]
'''[[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]'''
:*[[Battle of Vnas]]
:*[[Capture of Duro]]
'''[[Yuuzhan Vong War]]'''
:*The [[Battle of Duro (Yuuzhan Vong War)|Battle of Duro]] in [[26 ABY/Legends|26 ABY]]
:*A [[raid on Duro]] in [[28 ABY/Legends|28 ABY]]
:*A [[Battle of the Duro system|battle]] in the [[Duro system/Legends|Duro system]]
